caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a solid dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic adorned with small floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left corner of each frame, there is a circular logo containing the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to speak, her mouth opening and closing to form words. Her facial expression remains professional and engaged. In the final frames, she begins to gesture with her right hand, raising it slightly to emphasize her points while maintaining her gaze toward the camera. The lighting is consistent and focused on her, creating a clear contrast with the dark backdrop.
